content.description:
Tracking the migration from `document.createElement` to `api.createElement` for [Element Inspector](item://eeee0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001) coverage.

## Status: Userland migration complete (March 2026)

All 13 userland items that used `document.createElement` for UI elements have been converted to `api.createElement`. Two items listed in the original audit (error-view, hobson-instance-view) turned out to be Hob views with no `document.createElement` calls. One item (element-inspector) had no calls in the current code.

### Converted Items

| Item | Calls | Notes |
|------|-------|-------|
| [app-page-design-lib](item://9e0953dc-b75c-4015-9c6f-79afad34d5a1) | 27 | Added `api` param to `renderColumnOverlay` and `attachDragToReposition` |
| [repl-ui](item://f1111111-0003-0000-0000-000000000000) | 23 | Uses module-level `api` set on boot |
| [test-suite-view](item://7e570003-0000-4000-8000-000000000000) | 18 | |
| [json-editor](item://f1111111-0007-0000-0000-000000000000) | 11 | Uses `localApi.createElement` |
| [generic-editor](item://ffd688d1-93a8-4c4b-b09a-127b249294f5) | 11 | |
| [app-page-view](item://ef977316-0496-487a-b662-0ba07e40eea2) | 7 | Including `:render-child` mount point |
| [help-dialog](item://f1111111-0006-0000-0000-000000000000) | 4 | Uses module-level `api` set on boot |
| [field-editor-itemref](item://bccf2a2b-c750-417e-9d86-b96699cc5078) | 4 | |
| [field-editor-select](item://c28eeb82-aac7-4bea-9d7b-7d17c1fd73e7) | 2 | |
| [test-runner-service](item://7e570009-0000-4000-8000-000000000000) | 2 | |
| [field-editor-text](item://958dd20b-c30d-4eaa-b1f7-d73d2414c390) | 1 | |
| [field-editor-textarea](item://8271c69e-ec45-485b-9233-89efd8b562ab) | 1 | |
| [default-error-handler](item://e7707000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002) | 1 | |

### Skipped (no longer applicable)

- [error-view](item://e7707000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003) — now a Hob view, no `document.createElement`
- [hobson-instance-view](item://99999999-1111-0000-0000-000000000000) — now a Hob view, no `document.createElement`
- [element-inspector](item://eeee0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001) — no `document.createElement` in current code

### Already Handled (before this migration)

- [modal-lib](item://2264e4e7-4ff7-4013-9f09-5393ff0e3116) — supports `api?.createElement` with fallback
- [context-menu-lib](item://2cc0a1c5-5c09-49bd-834a-eaa2d0183b6c) — 51 calls already use `api.createElement`

### Not in scope

These use `document.createElement` for `<style>` tags, download links, or third-party code — not meaningful for inspector tracking:

- field-view-code-editable, field-view-markdown-editable, field-view-code-readonly — `<style>` only
- css-loader-lib, theme-hot-reload — `<style>` only
- kernel-export, extract-js — download `<a>` only
- codemirror — third-party
- bootloader.html — pre-kernel, no `api` exists

### Architecture: Base createElement

[kernel:core](item://33333333-1111-0000-0000-000000000000) exposes a generic `_baseCreateElement` slot in `createAPI()`. [viewport-rendering](item://f1111111-0008-0000-0000-000000000000) fills it during `RenderingSystem` construction (called by viewport-manager's boot handler), providing a base `createElement` without debug context. All subsequent `createAPI()` callers — watch handlers, REPL, etc. — get `api.createElement`. Per-render `enrichAPI` overrides it with a debug-attributed version for inspector coverage.

### Remaining: Kernel internals

[kernel:core](item://33333333-1111-0000-0000-000000000000) has 24 calls and [viewport-rendering](item://f1111111-0008-0000-0000-000000000000) has 5 calls in fallback UIs. These can't use `api.createElement` (chicken-and-egg).
